description:
Me and eight of my friends have been invited to visit Switzerland, here’s the full story.
This video has been color graded with the brand new On The Run Power Grade. 

You can find it on my website: https://www.nolanontherun.com
Join my Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/nolanontherun
Follow along:
Instagram – https://www.instagram.com/nolanontherun
TikTok – https://www.tiktok.com/@nolanontherun
